documents.topic: Legacy audit findings: pre-publication (P0/P1/P2) + modularization (MOD-001–MOD-014) — 1 FAIL (MOD-011), 1 REVIEW (MOD-008)

Migration scoping for unifying ASCII bidirectional codec under the family-Codable convention: feature-disposition matrix, bidirectional-shape resolution (B2 — non-refining ASCII.Serializable + ASCII.Parseable siblings), Error/Context disposition, stdlib integer dual-conformance resolution (C3), phased migration plan Φ.1–Φ.7
